text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People are calling this year's autumn Tenno Sho a
duel for the top between Oguri Cap and Tamamo
Cross.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a battle between extraordinary athletes.
Sakura Chiyono O may not have what it takes to
compete against them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if she wants to become Maruzensky's rival,
Sakura Chiyono O can't lose, no matter who her
opponent may be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Maruzensky arrives at Tokyo
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her heart pounds with anticipation at the future
Sakura Chiyono O is on the cusp of revealing.
